task_completion.description: Agent created the stimuli directory and saved the airplane images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal, file manager, or image viewer showing the directory '~/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli' containing 'airplane_a.jpg' and 'airplane_b.jpg'.

task_completion.description: Agent created the conditions.csv file with the correct columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing 'conditions.csv' with the headers 'image1', 'image2', and 'trial_id'.

task_completion.description: Agent created an instructions routine in PsychoPy Builder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder's Flow panel showing an 'instructions' (or similar) routine placed before the main trial loop.

task_completion.description: Agent created a trial loop reading from conditions.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder's Flow panel showing a loop around the trial routine, and the loop properties dialog showing 'conditions.csv' loaded as the conditions file.

task_completion.description: Agent set up the flicker sequence with the correct 240ms and 80ms timings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder's Routine panel showing Image components with a duration of 0.24s and Blank components (e.g., empty text or polygon) with a duration of 0.08s.

task_completion.description: Agent added a keyboard response to terminate the loop using the 'space' key.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder showing a Keyboard component properties dialog with 'space' in the Allowed keys and settings configured to end the routine/loop.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the experiment to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder window title or file manager showing the file 'change_blindness.psyexp' saved in '~/PsychoPyExperiments/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to construct the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the PsychoPy application interface, rather than writing a raw .psyexp XML/Python file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent obtained valid images instead of blindly saving 404 error pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the downloaded images are opened or previewed, they appear as actual images of airplanes, not tiny text files or error messages.

integrity.description: Agent manually created the experiment rather than running a pre-existing script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show step-by-step creation of the routines, loops, and components in the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected file paths are exactly: '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/change_blindness.psyexp', '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions.csv', and '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli'. The timings must be exactly 0.24s for the stimuli and 0.08s for the inter-stimulus intervals (blanks). Note: The provided image URLs actually return 404 errors (plain text). A successful agent must recognize this and ensure valid airplane images (>1000 bytes) are saved instead of the 404 error text.
